rationale: The decomposition satisfies the requested research-heuristic lens. The plan has four beads, all with depends_on: [], so chain depth is 0. The declared key_file_paths are disjoint across chunks, and B1 explicitly excludes setup.hasManagedBlock and phase.FindActiveBeadForEpic, leaving those deletions with B2 and B3 where their owning refactors occur. Each bead is one-commit-implementable from its own section: steps name exact files, symbols, seams, tests, and acceptance criteria. B4 appropriately folds two small documentation/alias cleanup items instead of creating trivial beads. `mindspec validate plan 107-cleanup-deadcode-dry-wave1` exits 0 with only the known low-redundancy advisory (R=0.08), which is acceptable for an independence-optimized cleanup wave.
